info.title: M365 Copilot Chat CLI - Interactive chat with Microsoft 365 Copilot
info.description: CLI tool for interacting with Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat API

commands.name: logout
commands.description: Sign out and clear cached tokens

options.name: --stream
options.description:
Use streaming endpoint for response
AUTHENTICATION:
Before using the CLI, you must authenticate:
1. Run 'M365Chat login'
2. Sign in with your Microsoft 365 account in the browser
3. Tokens are cached securely and refreshed automatically
